tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CAPO: I

VERSE 1:
 
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]B7[/ch]
We walked to the sea, just my father and me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
and the dogs played around on the sand.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]B7[/ch]
Winter cold cut the air hangin still everywhere,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
dressed in gray, did he say, “Hold my hand” ?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]G7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]           
I said, “Love’s easier when it’s far away.”[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
We sat and watched a distant light.[/tab]

CHORUS:
 
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
We’re two ships that pass in the night,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
we both smile and we say it’s alright.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]D#[/ch]  
We’re still here, it’s just that we’re out of sight,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]    
like those ships that pass in the ni.....ght.[/tab]
 

VERSE 2:
 
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]
There’s a boat on the line, where the sea meets the sky,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
there’s another that rides far behind.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
and it seems you and I are like strangers, a wide[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
ways apart as we drift on through time.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]           
He said, its harder now, we’re far away,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
we only read you when you write.[/tab]
 
REPEAT CHORUS
